content.tagline: Keeping Your Vessel Running Season After Season
content.about:
Welcome to Ben's Boatworks, a full-service marine facility based in Annapolis, MD, dedicated to keeping your vessel in peak operating condition no matter the season. We offer a comprehensive range of specialized marine services built around what boat owners actually need — reliable work done right, without the runaround.

At Ben's Boatworks, our expertise spans boat surveying and inspection, diving and underwater services, marine AC and climate control, and marine plumbing and sanitation. Whether you need a pre-purchase survey before buying a vessel, underwater hull work, a failing air conditioning system diagnosed and repaired, or a sanitation system that's giving you trouble, we have the hands-on experience to handle it. We approach every job with the same level of care — whether it's a routine inspection or a more involved repair.

We serve boat owners across South Florida and the surrounding waters, bringing dependable marine service to a region where your boat sees year-round use and the conditions demand equipment that actually works. Our clients range from first-time boat buyers to experienced captains, and we treat every vessel with the same attention to detail. At Ben's Boatworks, your boat represents a significant investment, and we take that seriously.
content.seoTitle: Ben's Boatworks | Boat Surveying & Inspection Annapolis, MD
content.seoDescription: Ben's Boatworks in Annapolis, MD offers boat surveying, underwater services, marine AC & plumbing across South Florida. Call today!

serviceDescriptions.Boat Surveying & Inspection: A thorough boat survey covers structural integrity, mechanical systems, electrical components, and overall vessel condition — giving buyers, owners, and insurers an accurate picture of what they're working with. Pre-purchase inspections help identify issues before they become expensive surprises, and condition-and-value surveys provide documentation needed for insurance or financing. Every survey is conducted with detailed reporting so you know exactly where your vessel stands.
serviceDescriptions.Diving & Underwater Services: Underwater inspections, hull cleaning, zinc replacement, propeller checks, and through-hull assessments are all handled without the time and cost of hauling out. Keeping the underwater running gear in good shape directly affects fuel efficiency, speed, and long-term hull integrity. Dive services let owners address problems quickly and keep vessels in the water where they belong.
serviceDescriptions.Marine AC & Climate Control: Marine air conditioning systems require specialized knowledge — saltwater-cooled units, raw water pumps, evaporators, and refrigerant handling all differ significantly from residential HVAC work. Diagnosis, repair, and seasonal servicing of onboard climate control systems keeps the cabin comfortable and prevents costly breakdowns. Routine maintenance of seawater strainers and pump impellers extends the life of the entire system.
serviceDescriptions.Marine Plumbing & Sanitation: Onboard plumbing and sanitation systems — including holding tanks, marine heads, macerators, Y-valves, and through-hulls — require proper installation and maintenance to function reliably and stay compliant with marine sanitation regulations. Leaks, odors, and failed components are diagnosed and repaired using marine-grade materials built to handle the demands of a saltwater environment. A properly functioning sanitation system protects both the vessel and the water around it.

content.serviceAreaDescription: Ben's Boatworks is based in Annapolis, MD and provides mobile marine services throughout South Florida within a 60-mile radius.
commonProjects: Pre-purchase boat survey and full condition inspection report
Underwater hull cleaning and zinc anode replacement without haul-out
Marine air conditioning diagnosis, repair, and seasonal servicing
Holding tank, marine head, and sanitation system repair or replacement
Propeller and running gear inspection via professional dive service
Through-hull fitting inspection and seacock servicing below the waterline
Marine plumbing leak diagnosis and repair using marine-grade components
